themes: Multi-location managers across franchises, fitness, hospitality, and residential property verticals have been waiting months or years for product conversations, signaling a systemic gap in closing the feedback loop at the Manager level.

Several enterprise and franchise accounts appear multiple times with different contacts still waiting, suggesting that unresolved product pain points are broad enough to affect multiple team members within the same organization.

The backlog spans a wide range of industries — from senior living and car washes to travel agencies and quick-service restaurants — indicating that the underlying product gaps being raised are likely cross-cutting workflow and reporting issues rather than vertical-specific niche requests.
